question.label: Decision bottlenecks
question.name: Which decisions are still getting stuck with you?
question.description: Drills into the specific bottlenecks Lin named to locate where load is concentrating.

answer: Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.

assessment.note: Lin acknowledges work stayed with them longer than it should have, which signals mild ownership drag rather than active momentum.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Keep or delegate
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should own right now?

new_queue.label: Decision support
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next two weeks easier?

new_queue.label: Closer next step
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
